top_signals.title: NATO allies have grown silent on rights concerns in Turkey
top_signals.summary: The West has mostly been focusing ‌on boosting ‌security ties with the regional military power and big arms exporter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Galderma Slumps After FDA Turns Down Botox Rival Relfydess
top_signals.summary: Galderma Group AG shares slumped the most in more than a year after the US Food and Drug Administration turned down the Swiss dermatology firm’s rival Botox treatment Relfydess.
